title: Employee Onboarding Checklist System
title_cn: 员工入职检查清单系统
description: Create an onboarding checklist with AI Agents to track tasks, progress, and employee onboarding steps.
description_cn: 借助 AI Agent 创建员工入职检查清单系统，跟进入职任务和完成进度。
author: NocoBase Team
prompt: Build a NocoBase app — Employee Onboarding Checklist System: an onboarding journey with progress tracking and a checklist dialog. Match the layout and signature visuals of this reference prototype: https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/08-onboarding-checklist.html
prompt_cn: 用 NocoBase 搭建一个应用 —— 入职清单:带进度跟踪的入职旅程和清单弹窗。布局和标志性视觉参照这个原型:https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/08-onboarding-checklist.html
